notes:
Hint required: Tsinghua → Cambridge (NOT Dalian Ocean U marine biologist; NOT UVA AI safety guy; NOT USTB CS). Exhaustive search across DBLP, OpenReview, Google Scholar, arxiv, Cambridge departmental directories (CST PhD students, structures, eng.cam.ac.uk, damtp), LinkedIn, GitHub, and Chinese-language searches yielded only ONE distinct 'Xuwang Yin' on the academic web — and that one matches both excluded profiles simultaneously: USTB undergrad/M.Eng (2007-2014) under Prof. Xu-Cheng Yin → UVA PhD (2016-2022) under Prof. Gustavo Rohde → CAIS (2023-2025) → independent (Qingdao). Confirmed via his CV at xuwangyin.github.io/xuwangyin_cv.pdf, DBLP single PID 125/2311, and arxiv author search returning only papers in his line. NO Tsinghua, NO Cambridge anywhere in his career.

The Tsinghua/Cambridge person described by the user does not surface in: (a) DBLP author search 'Xuwang Yin' (1 hit, the excluded one), (b) Cambridge CST PhD student directory (only Fei Yin), (c) Cambridge engineering structures Yin directory, (d) OpenReview Xuwang Yin papers (all UVA/CAIS), (e) Chinese-character searches '尹绪旺 清华' / '尹绪旺 剑桥' / '尹绪旺 博士' (zero matches with these exact chars + either institution; only unrelated 尹家绪/尹稚/尹鸿 appear), (f) variant char attempts (尹旭旺, 尹绪望) — zero hits, (g) LinkedIn site:linkedin.com Xuwang Tsinghua Cambridge — only unrelated profiles.

One misleading lead: a Tsinghua supervisor page returned by '尹绪旺 剑桥大学' search turned out to be 张超 (Zhang Chao), a different person with Tsinghua-Cambridge background. Surname char rejects (张 ≠ 尹).

Char-match floor not met for any candidate. Better empty than wrong per Rule 4. If the person exists with the described background, they have no discoverable public identity tied to '尹绪旺' / 'Xuwang Yin' under Tsinghua + Cambridge. Possibilities: (i) wrong characters on the DNC record, (ii) person has scrubbed online presence, (iii) different romanization (e.g., not 'Xuwang' for 绪旺) — but exploring these would risk wrong-email contamination.
